author: maigamo
description: Daily Task Auto Generator can helps you automatically generate daily task files with customizable templates.

manifest.author: maigamo
manifest.description: Automatically generate daily tasks in specified folders with custom templates
manifest.name: Daily Task Auto Generator

name: Daily Task Auto Generator

releases.author: maigamo
releases.description:
# New function
### English
- 🗓️ **New: Monthly/Daily Plan Generation**: Supports generation of both daily tasks and monthly plans for flexible scheduling
- 👁 **New: Template Preview Feature**: Preview the content of your template before generation to ensure accuracy
- 📊 **New: Auto Task Completion Stats**: Automatically tracks and reports completion stats for the previous day's tasks, with separate handling for weekdays and weekends

### 中文 
- 🗓️ **新增：每月 / 每日计划支持**：支持按月、按日生成计划任务，满足不同时间粒度需求
- 👁 **新增：模板预览功能**：生成前可预览模板内容，确保格式和内容准确
- 📊 **新增：自动统计任务完成情况**：每日自动统计前一日任务完成情况，并区分工作日与非工作日，便于回顾与改进

## Remarks
The interface was optimized and some bugs were fixed

releases.author: maigamo
releases.description:
# Features

### English
- 📝 **Automated Task Generation**: Automatically create daily task lists at startup or generate them manually when needed
- 📄 **Customizable Templates**: Fully supports task templates in both Chinese and English
- 📁 **Intelligent File Organization**: Tasks are neatly stored in a year/month folder structure for easy management
- 🌍 **Localized Month Names**: Automatically uses month names appropriate to your system language, e.g., “April” or “4月”
- ⚙️ **Multiple Automation Modes**: Choose from daily, workday-only, or fully manual generation modes
- 🌐 **Language Support**: Complete interface support for both English and Chinese

### 中文
- 📝 **自动任务生成**：支持启动自动生成每日任务，也可按需手动生成
- 📄 **自定义模板**：支持中英文双语模板，自由定义每日或每月任务内容
- 📁 **智能文件组织**：任务按“年/月”分类存储，结构清晰，便于查找
- 🌍 **本地化月份名称**：自动使用当前语言环境的月份格式（如“April”或“4月”）
- ⚙️ **多种自动模式**：支持每日、仅工作日或完全手动的任务生成方式
- 🌐 **双语界面支持**：完整支持中文与英文界面切换
